{{Fig|Exemplary graph showing the highest priority [[Glossary:Topic|topic]] (with the lowest priority %) that was missed in reviews. The data displayed at the bottom depends on the position of the mouse. In this example, it indicates that on Jun 26, 2013, the worst miss amongst [[Glossary:Topic|topics]] was a topic with [[Glossary:Priority|priority]] equal to 7.613% of the queue of the most important [[Glossary:Topic|topics]] to review.}}
